personal.name: Ocean Dsouza
personal.about: I would like to introduce myself as a student who is currently pursuing his bachelor's at the University of Wollongong in Dubai. I have worked on many projects with the assistance of many professors in the university. I have also participated a lot in the university among my peers, helping them out and peer tutoring them for advanced subjects. I specialize in JAVA, C++, C#, and most of the code I write considers all the use cases and is perfect.

qualification.title: Schooling
qualification.school: Our Own English High School Sharjah

Contact.Address: Al Maysaloon, Sharjah Behind Adnoc Petrol Station, Diyar Awkaf Building

Responsibilities.res1: Organising Data from sales, inbound and outbound on MySql.
Responsibilities.res2: Scanning items which have come from inbound.
Responsibilities.res3: Creating Clearnece stock list at the end of each week.
Responsibilities.res4: Esuring there is availability of stock for runners.
